commands.name: generate
commands.description:
Run code generation for a given EasyAF component.
Run 'code [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

Working directory for the code compiler. Defaults to
current directory.

options.name: -dontdelete
options.description: A directory that will be ignored when deleting files.

options.name: -notpublic
options.description:
A comma-separated list of table names to ignore when
generating the public API surface.

commands.name: generate
commands.description:
Generate EDMX files from database using existing configuration.
If no context name is specified, processes all .edmx.config
files found.

options.name: --context-name
options.description:
DbContext class name (used to locate
{ContextName}.edmx.config file). If not specified, all
.edmx.config files will be processed.

options.name: --project
options.description:
Path to the project directory (defaults to auto-detected
.Data folder)

options.name: --solution-folder
options.description:
Solution directory (defaults to current directory)
Default value is:

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

commands.name: refresh
commands.description:
Refresh existing EDMX files from the database. If no context
name is specified, processes all .edmx files found.
Run 'database [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

options.name: --context-name
options.description:
DbContext class name (used to locate {ContextName}.edmx
and {ContextName}.edmx.config files). If not specified,
all .edmx files will be processed.

options.name: --project
options.description:
Path to the project directory (defaults to auto-detected
.Data folder)

options.name: --solution-folder
options.description:
Solution directory (defaults to current directory)
Default value is:

commands.name: watch
commands.description:
Watch EDMX files in your Data project for changes and regenerate
the Framework.
Run 'edmx [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

options.name: -path
options.description:
Working directory for the code compiler. Defaults to current
directory.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --connection-string
options.description:
Connection string source (e.g.,
'appsettings.json:ConnectionStrings:DefaultConnection')
or actual connection string

options.name: --context-name
options.description: DbContext class name

options.name: --dbcontext-namespace
options.description:
Namespace for generated DbContext (defaults to
.Data project namespace)

options.name: --exclude-tables
options.description: Tables to exclude from scaffolding

options.name: --no-data-annotations
options.description: Use fluent API instead of data annotations

options.name: --no-pluralizer
options.description: Disable pluralization of entity names

options.name: --objects-namespace
options.description:
Namespace for generated entity objects (defaults
to .Core project namespace)

options.name: --provider
options.description:
Database provider (SqlServer or PostgreSQL)
Allowed values are: SqlServer, PostgreSQL.

options.name: --solution-folder
options.description:
Solution directory (defaults to current directory)
Default value is:

options.name: --tables
options.description:
Specific tables to include (if not specified, all
tables will be included)

options.name: --simplemessagebus-project
options.description:
Optional SimpleMessageBus project name to create
(e.g., 'MyApp.EventBus' or
'MyApp.SimpleMessageBus')
